features: Value Pack – 2 x 6 Blocks: Get 12 powerful bleach toilet blocks in total for long-lasting toilet freshness and hygiene.
Quick & Powerful Cleaning: Each block delivers fast-acting bleach cleaning to remove stains, eliminate bacteria, and keep your toilet sparkling.
Fights Limescale & Odours: Formulated to tackle stubborn limescale build-up while neutralising unpleasant odours for a fresher bathroom.
Lasting Freshness: Each block provides continuous cleaning and a fresh scent that lasts with every flush.
Simple to Use: Just drop a block into your cistern for hassle-free maintenance and a toilet that looks and smells clean every day.
description: Product description Maintain a clean, fresh, and hygienic toilet with this value pack of Power Bleach Toilet Blocks. Each block is formulated to deliver fast, effective cleaning while leaving behind a long-lasting fresh scent. With 12 blocks in total, this pack offers a convenient and economical solution for keeping your toilet in top condition. The powerful bleach-based formula activates with every flush, delivering quick and effective cleaning action. It works continuously to tackle grime, eliminate germs, and remove toilet bowl stains, ensuring your toilet stays visibly clean with minimal effort. Specifically designed to be tough on limescale and stains, these toilet blocks help dissolve existing build-up and prevent new deposits from forming. This reduces the need for frequent manual scrubbing and helps maintain a hygienic environment with less hassle. Each block provides a pleasant, lasting freshness that keeps your bathroom smelling clean between deep cleans. The subtle fragrance is released with every flush, helping to eliminate odours and maintain a welcoming atmosphere. Offering long-lasting value, each six-pack provides several weeks of use. With two six-packs included, you receive a total of twelve blocks—enough for extended protection across multiple toilets or bathrooms. Using the Power Bleach Toilet Blocks is simple. Just drop a block into your toilet cistern, and it will begin working immediately. There's no mess, no need for additional tools, and no complicated setup—just straightforward, reliable toilet maintenance. This pack includes 2 x 6 blocks, suitable for all standard toilet cisterns. Ideal for use in homes, offices, rental properties, or any high-traffic bathroom setting, these bleach blocks are an essential part of everyday hygiene and cleanliness. Keep your toilet clean, fresh, and protected with every flush—choose Power Bleach Toilet Blocks for a low-maintenance, high-performance solution. Ingredients anionic surfactants, non-ionic surfactants
